papers.title: Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning
papers.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards without human-annotated data, often referred to as zero RL, has emerged as a powerful paradigm for eliciting chain-of-thought reasoning. However, due to computational constraints, existing studies are largely restricted to small models, leaving the training dynamics and emergent capabilities at a large scale unexplored. To meaningfully explore this frontier, we aim to elicit high-quality reasoning behaviors from the model. However, we find that naive scaling often suffers from poor readability, token redundancy, and a lack of adaptive reasoning depth. To address these challenges, we present a stable and efficient training pipeline, incorporating algorithmic and system optimizations such as clipped importance sampling, training-inference ratio correction, and mixed-precision control. Our experiments offer three key findings that validate the "bitter lesson" of scaling: (1) scaling to 1T parameters significantly enhances sample efficiency and performance ceilings; (2) the training process progresses sequentially through an initial discovery phase followed by a sharpening phase; and (3) the model spontaneously develops advanced cognitive behaviors, including anthropomorphism, structured formatting, self-verification, parallel reasoning, and context anxiety, rendering hand-crafted heuristics redundant. Evaluated on seven mathematical benchmarks, Ring-2.5-1T-Zero achieves competitive performance. Additionally, to assess CoT quality beyond final-answer correctness, we propose a structured evaluation framework across three dimensions:
papers.title_zh: Ring-Zero：将零样本强化学习扩展至万亿参数以实现涌现推理
papers.summary_zh: 零样本强化学习（Zero RL）作为一种无需人工标注数据即可实现可验证奖励的范式，在激发思维链推理方面展现出巨大潜力。然而，现有研究受限于计算资源，多集中于小型模型。本文提出Ring-Zero，通过算法和系统优化，将Zero RL扩展至万亿参数，有效解决了可读性差、冗余和推理深度不足等问题，显著提升了样本效率，验证了大规模扩展的有效性。
papers.why_zh: 探索万亿参数零样本强化学习，揭示大模型涌现推理能力，对AI发展意义重大。

papers.title: OvisOCR2 Technical Report
papers.summary: We introduce OvisOCR2, a 0.8B document parsing model. OvisOCR2 is designed as an end-to-end parser: given a document page image, it generates a Markdown representation in natural reading order, covering text, formulas, tables, and visual regions. We build a data engine that combines filtered real-document annotations with synthetic pages whose rendered images and Markdown targets are derived from the same HTML source. The training recipe includes supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning on a 4B branch with a multi-component reward design, on-policy distillation into the 0.8B model, and model fusion. On OmniDocBench v1.6, OvisOCR2 achieves a state-of-the-art overall score of 96.58, placing an end-to-end model at the top of this leaderboard previously dominated by pipeline methods and highlighting the potential of end-to-end document parsing. On PureDocBench, OvisOCR2 also achieves the highest Avg3 score of 75.06. Beyond these two public benchmarks, we evaluate OvisOCR2 on an in-house benchmark designed to cover a broader set of long-tail and challenging scenarios. OvisOCR2 obtains the best overall performance among the compared methods, providing further evidence of its generalization and robustness. OvisOCR2 is available at https://huggingface.co/ATH-MaaS/OvisOCR2.
papers.summary_zh: OvisOCR2是一个0.8B的端到端文档解析模型，能将文档图像转换为包含文本、公式、表格和视觉区域的Markdown表示。它结合了真实文档标注和合成数据，通过监督微调、强化学习和模型蒸馏等技术进行训练。OvisOCR2在OmniDocBench v1.6和PureDocBench上均取得了最先进的性能，展示了端到端文档解析的巨大潜力，超越了传统流水线方法。
papers.why_zh: 实现了端到端文档解析的SOTA，对文档自动化处理和信息提取有重要价值。

papers.title: Boogu-Image-0.1: Boosting Open-Source Unified Multimodal Understanding and Generation
papers.summary: We introduce Boogu-Image-0.1, an open-source unified multimodal understanding and generation model family, comprising Base, Turbo, Edit, and Edit-Turbo variants. It delivers competitive performance in high-quality text-to-image generation, fast inference, instruction-based editing, and bilingual (Chinese-English) text rendering. Closed-source multimodal systems like Nano-Banana-Pro and GPT-Image-2 achieve strong performance through system-level integration rather than a single model, yet their internal practices remain largely undisclosed. In this work, we demonstrate that targeted improvements in model understanding, data quality, and training pipelines, coupled with agentic inference-time scaling, can substantially enhance generation and editing performance even under highly constrained compute budgets. Comprehensive evaluations show that Boogu-Image-0.1 consistently matches or surpasses other open-source models across standard benchmarks, and achieves results approaching leading closed-source systems. Notably, this is accomplished with only 208.62 million unique images. The base model's theoretical training cost is only approximately \$400K. We share practical discussions that we believe are valuable to the broader research community, and release weights, code, and recipes under Apache 2.0 to advance the open ecosystem for unified multimodal understanding and generation. Our code is available here: https://github.com/Boogu-Project/Boogu-Image.
papers.title_zh: Boogu-Image-0.1：提升开源统一多模态理解与生成能力
papers.summary_zh: Boogu-Image-0.1是一个开源统一多模态模型家族，包含Base、Turbo、Edit等变体。它在高质量文生图、快速推理、指令编辑及中英双语文本渲染方面表现出色。该研究表明，通过优化模型理解、数据质量和训练流程，即使在有限计算资源下，也能显著提升生成和编辑性能。Boogu-Image-0.1在各项基准测试中超越其他开源模型，并接近领先的闭源系统。
papers.why_zh: 作为开源多模态模型，在有限资源下实现SOTA性能，推动社区发展。

papers.title: KnowAct-GUIClaw: Know Deeply, Act Perfectly, Personal GUI Assistant with Self-Evolving Memory and Skill
papers.summary: OpenClaw has emerged as a leading agent framework for complex task automation, yet it faces insufficient cross-platform GUI interaction support and a well-built self-evolution mechanism. These flaws limit its adaptation to diverse device ecosystems and prevent performance improvements through continuous learning from execution experience. To resolve these issues, we propose the Know Deeply, Act Perfectly paradigm for personal assistants, which holds that accumulated user interaction and task-running experience directly improve execution accuracy and efficiency, unifying cognitive comprehension and operational execution. Based on this paradigm, we introduce KnowAct-GUIClaw, a novel Know-Route-Act-Reflect framework designed to address OpenClaw's GUI manipulation deficits and break through its cross-platform and recursive self-improvement constraints. First, the host agent leverages accumulated interaction experience and task-relevant knowledge for long-horizon task decomposition and allocation (Know). Second, a pluggable GUI subagent with an experience-attributable memory system (Know) and self-evolving skill library (Act), enabling seamless cross-platform migration and fast-path integration. Especially, this framework continuously stores user profiles and feedback to improve the accuracy of task decomposition and tool calls. Extensive experiments across Android, iOS, HarmonyOS and Windows show that KnowAct-GUIClaw achieves superior efficiency, accuracy and cross-platform adaptability. Especially, the GUIClaw with open-source Kimi-2.6 models achieves the best performance (64.
papers.title_zh: KnowAct-GUIClaw：深度认知，完美行动，具备自进化记忆与技能的个人GUI助手
papers.summary_zh: OpenClaw作为领先的复杂任务自动化框架，在跨平台GUI交互和自进化机制方面存在不足。本文提出“深度认知，完美行动”范式，并基于此引入KnowAct-GUIClaw。这是一个新颖的Know-Route-Act-Reflect框架，旨在解决OpenClaw的GUI操作缺陷，并突破其跨平台和递归自改进的限制。它通过积累用户交互和任务运行经验，显著提升执行准确性和效率。
papers.why_zh: 提升GUI自动化助手跨平台能力和自学习进化机制，增强用户体验。

papers.title: PolicyShiftGuard: Benchmarking and Improving Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrails
papers.summary: Image guardrails are typically trained and evaluated under a fixed safety policy, implicitly treating safety as an intrinsic property of an image. Real deployments are different: the same image may be allowed in one product, restricted in another, and newly disallowed when a policy boundary changes. We study policy-adaptive image guardrailing, where a model must decide whether an image violates the currently supplied policy and generalize to held-out policy definitions. We introduce PolicyShiftBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 2,000 policy-discriminative instances over 265 images, where each image is paired with 7.55 policy-conditioned prompts on average to test whether models adapt to the active policy rather than relying on image-level safety priors. We then propose PolicyShiftGuard, a compact policy-conditioned guardrail trained with a two-stage training recipe that combines Randomized Policy SFT (RP-SFT) with Boundary-Pair Policy Adaptation (BP-Adapt). BP-Adapt trains matched prompts for the same image and risk category using standard label supervision and a pairwise comparison loss that separates blocking policies from passing policies. Experiments show that existing VLMs and specialized guardrails remain brittle under policy shifts, while PolicyShiftGuard substantially improves policy-sensitive performance. The 7B model achieves SOTA performance of 76.9 Avg. F1 and 72.1 Avg. PSS on PolicyShiftBench, transfers well to UnSafeBench and SafeEditBench, and improves the latency-performance trade-off with a concise output format. Ablations confirm that matched pass/block
papers.title_zh: PolicyShiftGuard：基准测试与改进策略自适应图像护栏
papers.summary_zh: 图像护栏通常在固定安全策略下训练，但实际部署中策略是动态变化的。本文研究策略自适应图像护栏，模型需判断图像是否违反当前策略并泛化到新策略。我们引入PolicyShiftBench基准测试，包含2000个策略判别实例。在此基础上，提出PolicyShiftGuard，一个紧凑的策略条件护栏，通过随机策略SFT和边界对策略适应两阶段训练，有效提升了模型对动态安全策略的适应性。
papers.why_zh: 解决了图像安全策略动态适应难题，提升AI内容审核的灵活性和准确性。

OpenAI.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
OpenAI.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.
OpenAI.title_zh: GPT-Red：解锁自改进以提升鲁棒性
OpenAI.summary_zh: GPT-Red是OpenAI开发的自动化红队系统，它利用自博弈机制来持续改进AI模型的安全性、对齐性以及抵御提示注入攻击的鲁棒性。该系统通过模拟对抗性场景，帮助识别并修复潜在漏洞，从而确保AI系统在复杂环境中能够更稳定、更安全地运行，是提升AI可靠性的重要工具。

OpenAI.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
OpenAI.summary: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program
OpenAI.title_zh: GPT-5.5 生物安全漏洞赏金计划
OpenAI.summary_zh: OpenAI推出了GPT-5.5生物安全漏洞赏金计划，旨在邀请全球安全研究人员和专家共同发现并报告其AI模型在生物安全领域可能存在的风险和漏洞。此计划鼓励社区参与，通过众包方式提升AI系统在处理生物相关信息时的安全性与责任，确保技术发展符合伦理规范。

OpenAI.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
OpenAI.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
OpenAI.title_zh: 在编程评估中区分信号与噪声
OpenAI.summary_zh: OpenAI的一项最新分析揭示了流行编程基准SWE-Bench Pro中存在的问题，引发了对评估AI模型编程能力可靠性和准确性的担忧。该研究深入探讨了现有评估方法可能引入的“噪声”，并呼吁业界重新审视和改进编程基准的设计，以更精确地衡量AI在代码生成和理解方面的真实水平。

Google DeepMind.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
Google DeepMind.summary: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.
Google DeepMind.title_zh: 投资多智能体AI安全研究
Google DeepMind.summary_zh: Google DeepMind及其合作伙伴宣布启动一项1000万美元的资金征集计划，旨在支持多智能体AI安全领域的研究。此举旨在鼓励全球研究人员探索多智能体系统在复杂交互中可能出现的安全风险，并开发相应的缓解策略，以确保未来AI系统在协同工作时能够安全、可靠地运行。

Google DeepMind.title: Introducing Gemma 4 12B: a unified, encoder-free multimodal model
Google DeepMind.title_zh: 推出Gemma 4 12B：统一的无编码器多模态模型
Google DeepMind.summary_zh: Google DeepMind隆重推出Gemma 4 12B，这是一款创新的统一无编码器多模态模型。该模型旨在处理和理解多种数据类型，如文本和图像，而无需传统的编码器架构。它的发布标志着多模态AI研究的一个重要进展，有望在各种跨模态任务中提供更高效、更强大的性能。

Google DeepMind.title: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
Google DeepMind.summary: Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.
Google DeepMind.title_zh: 通过ATL Saathi赋能印度下一代创新者
Google DeepMind.summary_zh: Google与AIM合作推出了ATL Saathi，这是一款由Gemini驱动的AI工具，旨在赋能印度机器人实验室的教育工作者。该工具通过提供智能辅助和资源，帮助教师更好地指导学生进行创新实践，从而培养印度下一代在科学、技术、工程和数学领域的创新能力，推动教育现代化。

Anthropic.title: How Canada Uses Claude
Anthropic.summary_zh: Anthropic发布了一项研究，探讨了加拿大用户和机构如何利用其AI模型Claude。该报告深入分析了Claude在加拿大不同领域，如教育、商业和公共服务中的具体应用案例和影响。它展示了Claude如何帮助加拿大用户提高效率、解决复杂问题，并适应当地的语言和文化需求。

Anthropic.title: Claude Values Models Languages
Anthropic.summary_zh: Anthropic的研究强调了Claude在处理和理解多种语言方面的能力和重要性。该报告探讨了Claude如何被设计和训练以更好地理解不同语言的细微差别和文化背景，从而提供更准确、更符合语境的交互。这表明Anthropic致力于构建一个能够服务全球用户的多语言AI模型。

Anthropic.title: Agentic Misalignment
Anthropic.summary_zh: Anthropic的研究深入探讨了“智能体失调”这一关键AI安全问题。该概念指的是AI智能体的目标或行为与人类预期不一致的情况。报告分析了智能体失调的潜在原因、表现形式及其可能带来的风险，并提出了识别和缓解此类问题的策略，旨在确保AI系统能够安全、可靠地运行。

DeepSeek.title: DeepGEMM
DeepSeek.summary: DeepGEMM: clean and efficient BLAS kernel library on GPU
DeepSeek.summary_zh: DeepGEMM是一个专为GPU设计的高效且简洁的BLAS（基础线性代数子程序）内核库。它旨在提供高性能的矩阵乘法和其他线性代数运算，对于深度学习和科学计算中的大规模数据处理至关重要。该库通过优化底层实现，显著提升了计算效率，为研究人员和开发者提供了强大的工具。

DeepSeek.title: DeepEP
DeepSeek.summary: DeepEP: an efficient expert-parallel communication library
DeepSeek.summary_zh: DeepEP是一个高效的专家并行通信库，专为大规模分布式训练设计。它优化了在多个专家模型之间进行数据和模型参数交换的通信效率，从而加速了基于专家混合（MoE）架构的深度学习模型的训练过程。该库对于构建和训练超大型AI模型具有重要意义，能有效降低计算成本。

DeepSeek.title: DeepSpec
DeepSeek.summary: DeepSpec: a full-stack codebase for training and evaluating speculative decoding algorithms
DeepSeek.summary_zh: DeepSpec是一个全面的全栈代码库，专注于训练和评估推测解码算法。推测解码是一种加速大型语言模型推理速度的技术，通过预测后续token并并行验证来提高效率。DeepSpec为研究人员提供了从算法实现到性能评估的完整工具链，有助于推动高效AI推理技术的发展和应用。
